title: Ladies in Retirement
writer: Garrett Fort, Reginald Denham, Edward Percy
actors: Ida Lupino, Louis Hayward, Evelyn Keyes
plot: The housekeeper to a retired actress tries at the same time to look after her own two emotionally disturbed sisters, with dramatic results.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
